docs.name: Ripple
docs.description: Luminous orbs that drift slowly across the viewport — a liquid nebula hero background with warm, organic colour blooms.

props.name: mainCircleSize
props.description: Controls orb diameter — each orb renders at mainCircleSize × 4.5 px.

props.name: mainCircleOpacity
props.description: Peak opacity for every orb (0–1). Individual orbs shimmer around this value.

props.name: numCircles
props.description: Number of orbs to render. Capped at 8.

props.name: color
props.description: Pin all orbs to one colour (hex or rgba). Omit to use the built-in warm palette.

props.name: duration
props.description: Base drift-cycle length in seconds. Each orb is staggered so they never move in sync.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the wrapper div.

docs.overview: Ripple renders luminous drifting orbs across a dark background for a liquid-nebula hero effect. Tune `mainCircleSize`, `mainCircleOpacity`, `numCircles` (capped at 8), `color`, and `duration` to dial in the atmosphere — works well layered behind hero copy, product stages, and ambient panels.

scenarios.title: Live presence indicator
scenarios.description: Show a pulsing ripple behind an avatar to indicate a user is online or broadcasting.

scenarios.title: CTA focus ring
scenarios.description: Add a ripple effect behind a primary CTA button to make it visually magnetic.
